ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* Sub-industry information */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Standardized industry code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the industry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the industry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_data" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary data entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the salary data belongs to */,
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experience level */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title associated with the salary data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location for the salary data */,
  "median_pay" REAL /* Median pay for the specified experience level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the salary data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the salary data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary growth entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the salary growth data belongs to */,
  "start_experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Start experience level for the salary growth */,
  "end_experience_level_id" INTEGER /* End experience level for the salary growth */,
  "growth_type" TEXT /* Type of salary growth (e.g., percentage, dollar amount) */,
  "growth_percentage" REAL /* Salary growth percentage for the specified period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the salary growth record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the salary growth record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_growth_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user action */,
  "salary_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accessed salary data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_salary_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_data_id") REFERENCES salary_data ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or identifier of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, survey, crowdsourced) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_industries" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "mapping_description" TEXT /* Additional context for the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_industries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source entry */,
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salary data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_source_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_sources_salary_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_id") REFERENCES salary_data ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_growth_sources" (
  "growth_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth source entry */,
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salary growth data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "growth_source_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the growth source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the growth source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_growth_sources_growth_id FOREIGN KEY ("growth_id") REFERENCES salary_growth ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_growth_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_industries" (
  "user_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-industry mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "interest_level" TEXT /* User's level of interest in the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-industry mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-industry mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_industries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
